landing_meta_description: High school flagship hackathons across the world, brought to you by Hack Club.
landing_tagline: HIGH SCHOOL FLAGSHIP HACKATHONS ACROSS THE WORLD
landing_menu_sign_back_in_subtitle: GET BACK TO WORKING ON YOUR PROJECTS!
landing_signup_hint_keyboard: Press enter to enter your email
landing_hero_subtitle: We're running 7 hackathons across the world.
landing_blurb_intro: This summer, we're running something we've never done before.
landing_blurb_headline: 7 hackathons. Ran by teenagers across the globe. For teenagers everywhere.
landing_blurb_cities: Fly out to San Francisco, Sydney, Toronto, Berlin, Cairo, Singapore or Sao Paulo. For Free.
landing_blurb_adventure: Go on an adventure of a lifetime.
landing_how_step_3: Earn your ticket to a hackathon of your choosing
landing_event_shipwrecked_desc: A hackathon on an island in the Boston Harbor!
landing_event_scrapyard_desc: A hackathon about building the stupidest projects ever
landing_event_campfire_desc: A hackathon with a bunch of youtubers, including Michael Reeves and William Osman
landing_footer_love: With love from the Horizons team.
landing_footer_about_pre: Hack Club is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit and network of 60k+ technical high schoolers. We believe you learn best by building so we're creating community and providing grants so you can make awesome projects. In the past few years, we've partnered with GitHub to run
